recommendations.title: An Almost Ordinary Summer
recommendations.overview: Two families meet for a marriage that neither want, and things take a turn when the respective patriarchs fall in love.

recommendations.title: It's a Disaster
recommendations.overview: Four couples meet for Sunday brunch only to discover they are stuck in a house together as the world may be about to end.

recommendations.title: We Made a Beautiful Bouquet
recommendations.overview: Two people meet each other after missing the last train home, leading to a beautiful relationship over five years.

recommendations.title: Boy Meets Girl
recommendations.overview: In Kentucky, a transgender woman and her best male friend lament the lack of eligible partners and step across old boundaries of love and romance.

recommendations.title: Honeymoon Trips
recommendations.overview: The vicissitudes of three couples of newlyweds from the celebration of weddings to their respective honeymoons.

recommendations.title: Don't Blame the Kid
recommendations.overview: After a one-night stand results in pregnancy, a young woman decides to become partners with the emotionally immature father-to-be.

recommendations.title: I Got Life!
recommendations.overview: Aurore has separated, just lost her job, and learns that she is going to be a grandmother.

recommendations.title: Uranus 2324
recommendations.overview: Bonded in their youth and separated by tragedy, an astronaut and a free diver bend the laws of space and time in their efforts to be together again.

recommendations.title: Ek Main Aur Ekk Tu
recommendations.overview: Rahul and Riana meet each other for the first time, get drunk, and awake the next morning to find that they have gotten legally married to each other.

recommendations.title: Mass
recommendations.overview: Two couples meet for a painful and raw conversation in the aftermath of a violent tragedy.
